name: campaign-architect
description: Use when the user asks to "plan my paid account structure", "pick Search vs PMax", "lay out ad groups / asset groups", or "audit paid-vs-organic cannibalization"; designs campaign-type selection, ad-group/asset-group layout, targeting + match types, negative/exclusion hygiene, and a paid↔organic overlap audit, and scores the ROAS A (Audience) dimension + structure. Not for computing the final RQS — use ad-account-auditor; not for budget split — use budget-optimizer; not for organic site architec
author: aaron-he-zhu
